extortion.description: https://www.realtech-eg.com Real Tech for the manufacture of electrical and household appliances. A leading company in the manufacture of electrical and household appliances. Real Tech was established in Egypt in 2010 with the help of young people with a high level of technical experience and the highest scientific degrees, and the manufacture of high quality products at reasonable prices suitable for all spectrums of consumers. These factories are concentrated in Egypt in New Salhia City, First Industrial Zone
